name: Atchison Village
description_short: State-chartered credit union in Richmond, CA serving 1,800+ members since 1959 with $12.9M in assets and personalized financial services.
description_long:
Atchison Village Credit Union was established in 1959 and is headquartered in Richmond, California. It operates as a state-chartered credit union focused on serving the residents of California with community-oriented financial solutions. The credit union has maintained steady operations for over 60 years with a commitment to personalized member service.

The institution offers a comprehensive range of financial products including checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), auto loans, personal loans, mortgage options, and IRA/KEOGH accounts. Members can access digital banking through online banking platforms, a mobile app available on iOS and Android, remote deposit capture, mobile payments, and e-statements. The credit union also provides financial counseling and educational resources to help members make informed financial decisions.

Atchison Village distinguishes itself through its emphasis on personalized service and member experience. According to its latest review, members praise the credit union for being "most personable" and having "amazing courtesy" along with a "surprising range of services." The institution even offers unique perks like postage stamps and free greeting cards at its location. The credit union maintains a lean but dedicated operational structure with over 5 employees serving its member base.

The primary limitation is its single-branch physical footprint with zero ATMs, making it less convenient for members seeking widespread in-person access or ATM networks. The main office lobby is currently closed according to the website, and with only $12.9M in assets, the credit union is small compared to larger financial institutions. This makes it best suited for local Richmond-area residents who value personalized service and can navigate primarily digital banking channels. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Online banking with electronic signature authentication
pros: Personalized, high-touch member service with multiple reviews noting exceptional courtesy and professionalism
Comprehensive product suite including auto loans, personal loans, mortgages, CDs, and retirement accounts
Mobile banking app available on both iOS and Android for convenient account management
Remote deposit capture and mobile payments for modern digital banking convenience
Financial counseling and financial education resources included for members
Competitive positioning emphasized on lower fees compared to traditional banks
Strong member satisfaction with 5.0/5 star rating based on member reviews
cons: Only 1 branch location with 0 ATMs, limiting physical access for members outside Richmond area
Main office lobby currently closed, restricting in-person service availability
Small asset base of $12.9M limits institutional resources and product capabilities compared to larger credit unions
Limited member base of 1,800 members may result in fewer partnership benefits or network advantages
No explicit mention of shared branching or CO-OP network access to expand ATM/branch availability
best_for: Richmond, California residents seeking personalized, community-focused credit union banking
Local members who can conduct most transactions digitally and value high-touch customer service
Borrowers seeking auto loans or personal loans from a credit union with lower fees than traditional banks
Members interested in comprehensive financial counseling alongside basic banking services
diagnosis: Atchison Village Credit Union is best for Richmond-area residents who prioritize personalized service and community banking over extensive branch/ATM networks and can manage finances primarily through digital channels. The main caveat is its single physical location with no ATMs and limited institutional scale, making it less suitable for members requiring widespread in-person access or those relocating outside the Richmond area.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
